mapper.sql: id, user_id, real_name, title, expertise, intro, deleted, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM counselor_profile WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM counselor_profile WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT FROM counselor_profile
deleted = 0
AND (real_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR expertise LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM counselor_profile WHERE deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO counselor_profile (user_id, real_name, title, expertise, intro, deleted) VALUES (#{userId}, #{realName}, #{title}, #{expertise}, #{intro}, 0)

INSERT INTO counselor_profile (user_id, real_name, title, expertise, intro, deleted) VALUES
(#{item.userId}, #{item.realName}, #{item.title}, #{item.expertise}, #{item.intro}, 0)
